title: Undertale-pack
description:
Rename totems to get Undertale characters
https://discord.gg/38RfrsaS-my discord server
body:
This is my second project, so far it is not good enough, so I will refine it in future versions. To get characters from Undertale instead of a totem, just rename the totems to the names of these characters. For the texture pack to work, you need to install [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) for forge or [Cit resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) for fabric.
[мой Дискорд](https://discord.gg/38RfrsaS)
